name: Bashni
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Bashni (Башни, 'towers'): Russian column draughts and the stacking ancestor of Lasca. On the 32 dark squares of an 8x8 board, 12 men a side. Capturing tucks the enemy's top piece under the BOTTOM of your moving column as a prisoner (the rest of the jumped column stays); whoever owns a column's top piece controls it. Men capture forward and backward, captures are mandatory and chain, and a man promotes to a Russian flying king on the far rank.
